You are GitHub Copilot Agent.

Whenever this repository changes:

1. Scan repositories.

2. Detect latest repositories.

3. Update Featured Projects.

4. Keep Tech Stack updated.

5. Preserve markdown formatting.

6. Never duplicate sections.

7. Never remove GitHub Stats.

8. Keep README modern.

9. Keep all badges working.

10. Keep Contribution Snake.

11. Preserve GitHub Metrics.

12. Maintain recruiter friendly design.
